allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: FileWork desktop application

FileWork is a local directory AI assistant that helps users organize, generate reports, manage projects, research, and process data through natural language commands.

Key Features:
- Multi-LLM support (OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Ollama)
- File organization and analysis
- Document processing (PDF, DOCX, XLSX)
- Project scaffolding and management
- AI-powered chat interface with tool usage
- Skill-based extensibility system

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(gh repo create filework --public --description "Local directory AI assistant — tell it what to do and it works on your files. Organize, generate reports, manage projects, research, process data." --source=. --push)
